precondition: Voice workspace Profile tab is open
expected: The UI shows profile rei_calm, normal chat full mode, Direct Conversation brief mode, max length settings, conservative proactive / memory speaking toggles, never-spoken categories, and a speechSynthesis caveat.

precondition: Direct Conversation Mode and Voice Output are enabled with default settings
expected: The full reply remains visible in chat, while TTS speaks only the brief excerpt selected by Voice Profile v1.

precondition: Voice Output is enabled in normal chat with default settings
expected: The sanitized assistant reply is spoken in full mode.

precondition: Direct Conversation spoken mode is set to full
expected: TTS speaks the full sanitized assistant reply and the Event Stream records only mode and counts.

precondition: Direct Conversation spoken mode is set to silent
expected: The full reply remains visible in chat and no TTS starts. A safe skipped event records silent_mode.

precondition: Brief mode is enabled with configured max sentences and max characters
expected: Spoken text is capped to the configured sentence and character limits without changing the chat reply.

precondition: A candidate spoken text contains internal or sensitive content
expected: Speech is skipped for Debug, Prompt Preview, Event Stream, traces, memory internals, persona summaries, raw prompt, API keys, .env, stdout, stderr, full paths, JSON, or trace-like structured content.

precondition: Voice Profile applies full, brief, or silent decisions
action: Inspect Event Stream and event payloads
expected: Events include profile id, source, mode, counts, sentence count, max limits, and skip reason only. They do not include full assistant text or spoken text.
The fixed test voice plays through system speechSynthesis without writing chat content or implying a character voice.

precondition: An unsent typed draft exists while Direct Conversation is enabled
action: A voice transcript auto-sends and the assistant reply is spoken according to Voice Profile
expected: The typed draft remains in the input. Voice Profile changes only speech behavior, not draft preservation or chat routing.
